title: Scheduler deliberation route contract
changes: Add Scheduler-owned deliberation cycle command contracts.
Add /dev/shm route refs and specialist demand/opinion frames.
Add bus-ready observation facts for statistics and passive supervision.
Lock E5/OpenVINO as embedding only behind adapter.
Document GitHub as artifact exchange only.
guards: No parallel local server orchestrator is introduced.
No Scheduler.run(), Dispatcher, Queue, PolicyEngine, EventBus, or RouteRuntimeManager changes.
No GitHub client, network client, watcher, service, VisPy renderer, Qdrant client, OpenVINO runtime, PostgreSQL driver, or LLM SDK import.
/dev/shm is a multitask data-plane interface and future grid extension point, not durable authority.
EventBus carries observation facts/statistics only, not heavy payload commands.
validation: PYTHONPATH=src:. python -m compileall -q src tests tools
